titleStmt.title: SII 7.261: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 261. (A.R. No. 83 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT PAVANJA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
racāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
. svasti śrī . jayādbhudaya śakavaruṣa 1340 neya hēvilaṁbi
da vayiśākha śu 10 sō śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirājarājaparamēsva
ra gajabēṭekāṟa śrīvīra yi(ṁ)mmaḍidēvarāya mahārāyara nirū
padiṁ ĀṁṇapaOḍeyaru maṁgalūru bārakūra rājyavanu pra
tipālisuva kāladallū viṭhaladēviyarāda baṁgarumāda
rāda baṁgaru hoyisaṇa rājyada beḷuguḷada vēṁṭheya
tūra Ātrēyegōtrada gōyiṁdadēvagaḷa makkaḷu rāyapadēva
yaṁṇaṁgaḷige taṁma mūlada kakkevaḍa kavuṁteya
nu dānā¨rthavāgi dhāreya neṟadu koṭṭa catussīmeya vivara
harivariya vupina kaḷada sāliṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu ho
sida hiriya Upina kaḷadiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
diṁda hōguva yaddana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mūḍalu
baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdalū sāṇatavaneṁba hāruvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ pa
ḍuvalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa gade bayalu
maneya bāgila gade mūḍe 1 . Ubhayaṁ bittuva gade baḷa 30 lekkada mūḍe
yeravāḷamāṭada Upinakaḷa yidaṟa Oḷaguḷa makki mara maṁki niḍilu nidi
nikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa yakṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha (A)sādhya Ārāma kūpa Oḷa
gāda Āṣṭabhōga tējasvā(ṁ)myayēnuḷadanu baṁgaru hariyaṁṇaṁgaḷi
ge nāḷuvāgi dhāreya neṟadukoṭṭaru yi bhūmiyanū hariyeṁṇaṁge taṁ
ma makkaḷu saṁtānapāraṁpareyāgi bhōgisibaharu yi bhūmige
staḷa sīme pāḷaUṁjada śrī mahādēvarige prativaruṣadalū vriścikamāsada
lū Oṁdu hāḍa teṁgina yeṁṇeyanū naḍasibaharu yiThe rest of the record is lost.
Digital edition of SII 7.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
